name: fullstack-orchestrator
description: AI-guided full-stack project discovery, durable context, and Git collaboration with deterministic local verification.

interface.shortDescription: Define, build, resume, and release coherent full-stack projects.
interface.longDescription: Use natural language to discover a service, create or adopt a framework-neutral harness, coordinate Git workspaces and product contracts, recover context after cloning, and verify one exact release candidate.
defaultPrompt: Start a new full-stack service with me.
Audit the project context and tell me what is next.
